video_title: Devil May Cry | Official Lyric Video | Afterlife by Evanescence | Netflix
reply_text: @1991kessu  I will agree to the Allegory of war that I didn't like either. Lady in the 3rd game was not really a femme fatale, mainly just an angry teenage girl out for revenge which i feel like the show captured, compared to DMC 4 and 5 where indeed she is a femme fatale but this is young lady so I let that one slide, Dante beinf goofy, unserious and pretty much comical is not that out of character but everytime there is mention of serious trauma like his family, he changes attitude. Here is my take on the show I agree that its modernized, I agree the allegory was shit totally agree on that one, Lady and Dante's aren't that badly adapted I'd say its pretty good in fact cuz they are both young and one is angry at demons the other uses sarcasm and comedy as a defense mechanism which is very Dante. Another thing that I disliked was Agni and Rudra not being talking swords. However, in terms of combat, Dante is mad fast, strong af guns cannot even handle his grip which is the canon reason as to why Ebony and Ivory were created, his healing factor is op, he healed from a close range shotgun shell and bomb in his neck. Granted he is not as strong as in the game so if you dislike that thats fair enough. Overall though, the show is not the best I grant you that but its really not THAT bad that some people are saying its worse than the reboot, at the least the designs are there, the important plot points are also there, like Arkham turning into a demon, Vergil serving Mundus, Lady hating demons. Overall its really like a 7/10. Some things are just corny but its really not THAT bad
